creator: tom@hur.st
text:
* Beech Rintoul (beech@freebsd.org) wrote:

> The port doesn't pass my tinderbox because of pkg-plist problems. I
> have corrected and resorted the plist.

Good catch, your patch looks good aside from the two share/license
@dirrm's, which are managed by the ports system.

Also PORTREVISION should probably be incremented?  I should probably
have dropped that for 0.96, oh well :)

Updated patch attached.

-- 
Thomas 'Freaky' Hurst
